channel.title: XTS on BurningXFlame
channel.description: Recent content in XTS on BurningXFlame

item.title: Intro
item.description: XTS - Secure and Adaptive Cross-Region Transmission for Cloud XTS is a Cloud-Native Cross-Region Transmission Service which improves the security of Cross-Region Transmission,

item.title: Use
item.description: Define a Region Define a Region via CR: apiVersion: ext.burningxflame.github.com/v1 kind: Region metadata: namespace: <ns> name: <name> spec: # the internal port of XTS for the destination region internalPort: <port> # the external (i.

item.title: Features
item.description: Function Cross-Region Transmission XTS establishes secure tunnels between regions, and enables cross-region transmission. Multiple Regions XTS supports multiple regions. You may define as many regions as you like.

item.title: ATC
item.description: Adaptive and Fair Hierarchical Transmission Control. Hierarchical For example, the bandwidth is 100 M/s there are three priorities: S, A, and B, and the bandwidth ratio is 5:3:2.

item.title: Pricing
item.description: Pricing and Licensing XTS XTS Add-On License Commercial License Commercial Add-On License Features Learn More → Learn More → Support Email Email Buy ↗ Buy ↗ With the purchase of a commercial license:

item.title: RESTful
item.description: Create/Update a Region Request Method: PUT URL: https://<host:port>/regions/<namespace>/<name> Header: Content-Type: application/json Body: { "internalPort": <port>, "externalAddr": "<host>:<port>" } View Use → for detailed description of each field.

item.title: Release History
item.description: v1.2.0 2024-07-03 Add-On Feature ATC Adaptive and Fair Hierarchical Transmission Control v1.1.0 2024-06-25 Category Feature API RESTful v1.0.0 2024-05-28 Category Feature API CR Function Cross-Region Transmission Function Multiple Regions Security Secure Tunnels Security Minimize Attack Surface Security Reject Connections From the Public Internet Security Protect Services From Being Exposed to the Public Internet Security Defend Against DDoS Attacks Security Defend Against Slow Attacks Security Close Idle Connections Scalability Vertical Scaling Scalability Horizontal Scaling Reliability Truly Distributed Reliability Load-Balancing Reliability Established Connections Remain Intact on Config Changes Reliability Zero Downtime During Scaling Out/In Reliability Zero Downtime During Upgrade Reliability Zero Downtime on Temporary Errors Reliability Zero Downtime on Process Crash Logging High-Performant Logging and Log Rotation Deployment Docker Image and Helm Chart Upgrade Seamlessly Upgrade to a New Version

item.title: Installation
item.description: Prerequisite Cert Manager XTS depends on cert-manager ↗ to issue certificates. You’ve probably been using cert-manager. If so, you can skip this section.
